zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期维持震荡上行趋势
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在1673.75附近波动，整体呈小幅震荡整理。短期均线SMA(20)位于1660.40之下，显示多头仍占据优势，价格略高于均线支撑，表明短线可能继续维持温和上行态势。  

MACD指标显示数值为8.57305，虽然信号线未给出，但MACD正值提示多头动能尚存，市场短期仍偏向买方力量。然而，24小时涨幅仅0.06%，反映市场动力有限，需警惕价格在关键阻力附近遇挫。  

支撑位主要集中在SMA(20)即1660一线及近期低点1672.98附近，如价格回落至此区域，有望获得支撑反弹。阻力位在前高1674.34附近，如突破该点位，可关注1678-1680区域作为进一步目标。  

交易建议上，短线投资者可在支撑区域附近考虑低吸，止损可设在1660下方；若价格突破阻力，可顺势轻仓追涨。风险控制依旧关键，避免在震荡行情中追高，等待明确趋势确认再加仓更为稳健。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently showing a cautious upward bias, with the price holding slightly above the 20-period simple moving average at $1660.40. The narrow intraday range between $1672.98 and $1674.34 reflects low volatility, suggesting consolidation after recent bullish attempts. Traders should note that sustained movement above $1674 could signal a continuation of the short-term uptrend, while a break below $1660 would weaken bullish sentiment and test deeper support near $1650.  

The MACD reading at 8.57305, though lacking a signal line for confirmation, hints at emerging bullish momentum. Without the RSI, momentum confirmation is incomplete, but the fact that the price is above the SMA(20) indicates buyers are slightly in control. Watching for a bullish MACD crossover or the RSI moving above 50 could strengthen the case for additional long positions. Conversely, any quick reversal below the SMA may trigger short-term selling pressure.  

Immediate support is found at the SMA(20) near $1660, with additional levels around $1650 and $1640, which have historically absorbed downward pressure. Resistance is close to $1675, with a more significant barrier near $1700. Breaks beyond these levels could set the tone for the next directional leg, giving traders opportunities to capitalize on either breakout or retracement scenarios. Position sizing and stop-loss placement near these levels remain essential.  

For traders, a conservative approach may involve waiting for confirmation above $1675 before entering long positions, or using dips toward $1660–$1650 as potential accumulation zones. Short-term scalpers could exploit the tight range with careful stops, but risk is elevated given low volatility. Overall, Ethereum is in a tentative bullish posture, yet caution is warranted until a clear breakout or breakdown occurs.
